title: neolloydia ceratites
intro: Neolloydia ceratites, also known as the Living Rock, is a type of flowering succulent plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Neolloydia ceratites include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and protect against pathogens, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Neolloydia ceratites can be prepared as a topical salve or infused in oil to harness its medicinal properties, making it an effective and versatile herbal remedy.
